name: Missile Pilot
short_description: Pilot missiles around obstacles to detonate them in the core of enemy spaceships in this arcade-style flying game. Feel like ace pilot -- if your reflexes are good enough!
detailed_description:
Missile Pilot launches you into a dark sci-fi world, guiding your very own nuclear missile up the exhaust of an enemy battleship. Dodge lasers, weave through obstacles, and anticipate moving gaps as you try over and over to get one of your pilots through to the critical weakpoint. Your commander assures you that your death is a necessary and honorable sacrifice!



An arcade piloting game that plays like a runner -- push yourself to complete levels in faster and faster times, or see how long you can survive endless mode. Brakes are for cowards! Controls are locked in until you're in the exhaust pipe, and you can speed up but never slow down. How much speed can you handle?




Ten pulse-pounding handcrafted levels await, and dedicated pilots can even take on endless mode.

Missile Pilot is developed by Jed Davies using Unreal Engine 5. Featuring hand-drawn art by Lauren Fox.
